productDisplayName: Lotto Women Koro W Navy Blue Flip Flops
description: Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with a stylish upper that makes it a great buy. Upper Soft straps with a twill tape toe separator, for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in place Padded and dot-textured footbed that is curved ergonomically Printed footbed for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves for absolute grip and traction Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
